name: Masala Dosa
description: Golden crispy crepe made from fermented rice and lentil batter, filled with spiced potato masala. Served with coconut chutney and hot sambar.

name: Idli Sambar
description: Soft, steamed rice cakes served with piping hot lentil soup (sambar) and fresh coconut chutney. A timeless South Indian breakfast.

name: Medu Vada
description: Crispy lentil fritters with a fluffy interior, shaped like a doughnut. Deep-fried to golden perfection and served with sambar and chutney.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Aromatic basmati rice slow-cooked with fresh vegetables, saffron, and whole spices in the traditional dum style. A royal feast in every bite.

name: Ven Pongal
description: Classic comfort food made with rice and lentils, generously seasoned with crushed black pepper, roasted cashews, and pure ghee.

name: Rava Dosa
description: Light and lacy semolina crêpe with a uniquely crispy texture, dotted with diced onions and green chilies. A quick and delicious treat.

name: Curd Rice
description: Creamy yogurt rice—a cooling South Indian classic—tempered with popping mustard seeds, aromatic curry leaves, and a hint of ginger.

name: Filter Coffee
description: Authentic South Indian decoction coffee, brewed slowly through a traditional brass filter and served frothy and hot in a classic tumbler-dabarah set.

name: Chicken Chettinad Curry
description: A bold and fiery curry from the Chettinad region of Tamil Nadu, slow-cooked with freshly ground spices including star anise, marathi mokku, and kalpasi.

name: Payasam
description: A rich and fragrant South Indian sweet dessert made with vermicelli or rice, cardamom, cashews, raisins, and simmered in full-cream milk.

name: Rasam
description: A thin, tangy and spicy tamarind-tomato soup seasoned with pepper, cumin and asafoetida. South India's ultimate comfort soup.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Thick and creamy Alphonso mango blended with chilled yogurt and a touch of cardamom. Pure, refreshing, tropical indulgence.
